description_long: This is a large rectangular cardboard shipping box, commonly used for transporting goods in urban environments. The box is light brown with a wide strip of packing tape running along its top and down the sides, indicating it is securely sealed. One face of the box features prominent black printed handling symbols, including icons for 'fragile', 'this side up', 'keep dry', and 'handle with care', along with the word 'FRAGILE' in bold. The other faces are plain except for a small set of handling symbols on the top. The box appears to be made of corrugated cardboard, suggesting it is lightweight but sturdy enough for shipping. Its size and markings make it suitable for placement on sidewalks, in delivery trucks, or at building entrances.
description: A large, taped cardboard shipping box with black 'fragile' and handling symbols printed on one side. The box is light brown and appears sturdy, suitable for urban deliveries.
description_view_0: A plain light brown side of the box with a vertical strip of tape running down the center.
description_view_1: The front face of the box, displaying black 'fragile' and handling symbols, as well as the word 'FRAGILE' in bold.
description_view_2: Another plain side of the box, similar to view 0, with a vertical strip of tape and no visible symbols.
description_view_3: A view similar to view 1, showing the 'fragile' and handling symbols, but from a slightly different angle.
